title: Discharge of financial obligations
doc_html:
§724.  Discharge of financial obligations

The compact administrator may make or arrange for any payments necessary to discharge any financial obligations imposed upon this state by the compact or by any supplementary agreement entered into thereunder.  

Added by Acts 1958, No. 336, §1.
doc_text:
§724.  Discharge of financial obligations
The compact administrator may make or arrange for any payments necessary to discharge any financial obligations imposed upon this state by the compact or by any supplementary agreement entered into thereunder.
Added by Acts 1958, No. 336, §1.
